---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
subtitle: "Shiva Sagar — MSc Business Analytics"
date: "April 2025"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: article
---

<style>
.cv-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 2rem; border-bottom: 3px solid #2563eb; padding-bottom: 1rem; }
.cv-section { margin-top: 2rem; }
.cv-item { margin-bottom: 1.2rem; }
.cv-item h4 { margin: 0; color: #0f172a; }
.cv-item .org { font-weight: 600; color: #2563eb; }
.cv-item .period { float: right; color: #64748b; font-size: 0.9rem; }
.skill-tag { background: #eff6ff; color: #1e40af; border-radius: 0.4rem; padding: 0.25rem 0.7rem; font-size: 0.85rem; display: inline-block; margin: 0.15rem; }
@media print { .skill-tag { border: 1px solid #2563eb; } .cv-item .period { float: right; } }
</style>

:::: {.cv-header}
# Shiva Sagar

**MSc Business Analytics Student | Data Analyst | Business Strategist**

{{< fa location-dot >}} Dublin, Ireland &nbsp;|&nbsp;
{{< fa phone >}} +353 089 463 1708 &nbsp;|&nbsp;
{{< fa envelope >}} [shiva.sagar7130@gmail.com](mailto:shiva.sagar7130@gmail.com) &nbsp;|&nbsp;
{{< fa brands linkedin >}} [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/shiva-sagar-){target="_blank"} &nbsp;|&nbsp;
{{< fa brands github >}} [GitHub](https://github.com/shivasagarsulige2-rgb){target="_blank"}
::::

---

:::: {.cv-section}
## {{< fa user >}} Profile

Driven and highly motivated Business Analytics graduate student (Dublin City University) with a strong analytical mindset and proven ability to rapidly master new concepts. Possessing exceptional communication and quantitative skills with real-world experience across entrepreneurship, accounting, and HR. Fully committed to pursuing professional qualifications and becoming a long-term strategic analytics partner.

**IT Skills:** Word · Excel (VLookups, Pivot Tables, Formulae) · SQL · Power BI · Python

**Availability:** Full-time from **October 2026**
**Visa:** Stamp 2 · Eligible for Stamp 1G from September 2026
::::

---

:::: {.cv-section}
## {{< fa graduation-cap >}} Education

:::: {.cv-item}
#### MSc Business Analytics
[Dublin City University]{.org} [2025 – Present]{.period}

**Modules:** Research Methods, Analytical Tools and Programming (Python/SQL), Strategic Thinking Tools and Techniques, Statistical Models and Methods of Business Analytics, Advanced Analytics & AI (NLP, BERT, Deep Learning, LLMs), Analytics Visualisation & Communication (Power BI), Corporate Strategy and Leadership, New Venture Strategy & Planning, AI-Powered Portfolio & Analytics Challenges.

**Practical:** VR Lab presentation skills training · Challenge-Based Learning with industry partners · GitHub ePortfolio development · Power BI KPI dashboard projects
::::

:::: {.cv-item}
#### BA Business Administration
[ICFAI Business School]{.org} [2024]{.period}
::::
::::

---

:::: {.cv-section}
## {{< fa briefcase >}} Work Experience

:::: {.cv-item}
#### Co-Founder
[Wrench Mate PVT LTD]{.org} [Apr 2024 – Jul 2025]{.period}

- Administered the entire product lifecycle from concept and development to maintenance, ensuring **99.9% uptime** and consistent user experience across the platform
- Developed and executed a low-cost, multi-channel marketing strategy securing the first **₹50,000 in recurring monthly revenue** and growing the user base to **100+ active accounts**
- Analysed all financial operations including P&L tracking, vendor negotiations, and budget allocation, maintaining a burn rate **30% below projections**
- Spearheaded all core business functions — sales, financial planning, and client relations — as central decision-maker in a lean, fast-paced environment
::::

:::: {.cv-item}
#### Assistant Accounts Intern
[Samisthi PVT LTD]{.org} [Jun 2023 – Aug 2023]{.period}

- Posted daily receipts and payments in accordance with corporate protocols
- Communicated with a team of 6 regarding bookkeeping issues and resolutions
- Provided audit support by supplying requested documentation promptly and accurately
- Assessed accounts payable and receivable activities, upholding vendor relationships and positive cashflow
- Tracked expenses and income while organising and monitoring bank statements
::::

:::: {.cv-item}
#### Human Resources Intern
[ITS Planners and Engineers]{.org} [Jun 2022 – Aug 2022]{.period}

- Co-ordinated HR team with onboarding of **10+ full-time** IT employees and **25+ part-time** roles, improving employee retention rates
- Managed confidential personnel files, maintaining accuracy and strict privacy standards
- Tracked employee attendance, identifying trends and providing management insights
- Streamlined recruitment processes for increased efficiency in talent acquisition
::::
::::

---

:::: {.cv-section}
## {{< fa code >}} Technical Skills

**Languages & Platforms:**
[Python]{.skill-tag} [SQL]{.skill-tag} [Power BI]{.skill-tag} [Excel]{.skill-tag} [Word]{.skill-tag}

**Machine Learning & AI:**
[Scikit-learn]{.skill-tag} [BERT]{.skill-tag} [T5]{.skill-tag} [NLP]{.skill-tag} [Generative AI]{.skill-tag} [LLMs]{.skill-tag} [XGBoost]{.skill-tag}

**Data & Visualisation:**
[Plotly]{.skill-tag} [Pandas]{.skill-tag} [NumPy]{.skill-tag} [Matplotlib]{.skill-tag} [Power BI Dashboards]{.skill-tag}

**Tools:**
[Git]{.skill-tag} [GitHub]{.skill-tag} [Quarto]{.skill-tag} [VS Code]{.skill-tag} [Jupyter]{.skill-tag} [CRISP-DM]{.skill-tag}
::::

---

:::: {.cv-section}
## {{< fa star >}} Selected Projects

| Project | Description | Stack |
|---|---|---|
| BERT vs T5 Sentiment Analysis | Compared discriminative vs generative NLP models on Amazon Polarity dataset | Python, Transformers, Plotly |
| Interactive E-Commerce Dashboard | Seasonal sales analytics dashboard with interactive Plotly charts | Python, Pandas, Plotly |
| Scikit-Learn Model Showdown | Benchmarked Logistic Regression, Random Forest & XGBoost on customer-churn data | Python, Scikit-learn, Plotly |
::::

---

:::: {.cv-section}
## {{< fa globe >}} Languages

**English** — Fluent
**Hindi** — Native
::::

---

*References available upon request — see [Contact](../contact.qmd) page.*
